name: Firebase
description: Google's app development platform offering backend services, analytics, and hosting for web and mobile applications.

years.notes: Triangular flame logomark introduced at Google I/O May 2016 when Firebase expanded to a unified app platform. Material Design style with three geometric planes in amber and orange.
Redesigned flame logomark by R/GA, unveiled at Google I/O May 2024. Organic overlapping teardrop shapes replacing the geometric triangular form. Official brand guidelines asset.
